rationale: Hard pass for Paper.io 2. The muted earth-tone palette (#4A5D6A, #8B7355, #2F3E46) and architectural cross-section storytelling are the polar opposite of the game's bright neon top-down territory grab — there is no plausible bridge from "secret bunker reveal" to drawing trails and capturing zones, so the hook would massively mis-set expectations and tank IPM/D1. Additionally the archetype is a single-creative cluster (327d old, velocity 0.092), so there's no market validation to justify the production cost of force-fitting it.
